texto: Do not expect trust to appear suddenly and in a state of completion. Trust grows gradually as we venture forth little by little, with God and each other. As our trust grows, so will our willingness and courage to speak and listen with greater freedom. Seeing things more clearly is often one of the fruits of our growing trust.
explicacao: Citação de Jeannette A. Bakke sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. “Do not expect trust to appear suddenly and in a state of completion. Trust grows gradually as we …” articula fe, communion-with-god, community em registro de fe, com relevância para contextos como community e amizade.
